login.title: Welcome to {appName}
login.subtitle: Your open source AI platform for work
login.emailVerified: Your email has been verified! Please sign in to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.successMessage: Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox.
forgotPassword.errorFallback: An error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.successMessage: Password reset successfully. Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.errorFallback: An error occurred during password reset.
resetPassword.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

verifyEmail.missingToken: Missing verification token. Try requesting a new verification email.
verifyEmail.failedVerification: Failed to verify your email - {errorDetail}. Please try requesting a new verification email.

waitingOnVerification.notVerifiedMessage:
Hey, *{email}*, it looks like you haven't verified your email yet.
Check your inbox for an email from us to get started!
waitingOnVerification.noEmail: If you don't see anything, click
waitingOnVerification.newEmailSent: A new verification email has been sent!
waitingOnVerification.failedToSend: Failed to send a new verification email - {errorDetail}

error.title: Authentication Error
error.subtitle: There was a problem with your login attempt.
error.contactCloud: If you continue to experience problems, please reach out to the Onyx team at
error.contactAdmin: If you continue to experience problems, please reach out to your system administrator for assistance.

errorCodes.access_denied: Access was denied by your identity provider.
errorCodes.login_required: You need to log in with your identity provider first.
errorCodes.consent_required: Your identity provider requires consent before continuing.
errorCodes.interaction_required: Additional interaction with your identity provider is required.
errorCodes.invalid_scope: The requested permissions are not available.
errorCodes.server_error: Your identity provider encountered an error. Please try again.
errorCodes.temporarily_unavailable: Your identity provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

createAccount.title: Account Not Found
createAccount.description: We couldn't find your account in our records. To access Onyx, you need to either:
createAccount.beInvited: Be invited to an existing Onyx team
createAccount.differentEmail: Have an account with a different email?

impersonate.title: Impersonate User
impersonate.adminNote: Note: This feature is only available for @onyx.app administrators

referralSource.label: How did you hear about us?

accessRestricted.title: Access Restricted
accessRestricted.seatLimitExceeded: Your organization has exceeded its licensed seat count{counts}. Access is restricted until the number of users is reduced or your license is upgraded.
accessRestricted.cloudSuspended: Your access to Onyx has been temporarily suspended due to a lapse in your subscription.
accessRestricted.licenseSuspended: Your access to Onyx has been temporarily suspended due to a lapse in your license.
accessRestricted.noLicense: An Enterprise license is required to use Onyx. Your data is protected and will be available once a license is activated.
accessRestricted.manageUsers: If you are an administrator, you can manage users on the
accessRestricted.upgradeOrReduce: page or upgrade your license on the
accessRestricted.updatePayment: To reinstate your access and continue benefiting from Onyx's powerful features, please update your payment information.
accessRestricted.adminResubscribe: If you're an admin, you can manage your subscription by clicking the button below. For other users, please reach out to your administrator to address this matter.
accessRestricted.errorResubscription: Error opening resubscription page. Please try again later.
accessRestricted.renewLicense: To reinstate your access and continue using Onyx, please contact your system administrator to renew your license.
accessRestricted.getStartedLicense: To get started, please contact your system administrator to obtain an Enterprise license.
accessRestricted.adminBillingLink: If you are the administrator, please visit the
accessRestricted.renewPage: page to renew your license, sign up through Stripe or reach out to
accessRestricted.activatePage: page to activate your license, sign up through Stripe or reach out to

adminNav.tierTooltipEnterprise: This feature is available on the [Enterprise version of Onyx](/admin/billing) only.
adminNav.tierTooltipBusiness: This feature is available on the [Business or Enterprise version of Onyx](/admin/billing) only.

deleteChat.title: Delete Chat
deleteChat.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.

appChrome.failedToDeleteChat: Failed to delete chat. Please try again.
appChrome.failedToExportChat: Failed to export chat. Please try again.

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Customize AI behavior and knowledge for you and your team's use cases.

appSidebar.emptyChatHistory: Try sending a message! Your chat history will appear here.

deleteChat.title: Delete Chat
deleteChat.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.

profile.title: Profile
profile.fullNameDescription: We'll display this name in the app.
profile.workRoleDescription: Share your role to better tailor responses.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.colorModeDescription: Select your preferred color mode for the UI.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.deleteAllChatsDescription: Permanently delete all your chat history.
dangerZone.deleteAllChatsWarning: All your chat sessions and history will be permanently deleted. Deletion cannot be undone.
dangerZone.deleteAllChatsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all chats?

accessToken.title: Access Token
accessToken.saveWarning: Save this token before continuing. It won't be shown again.
accessToken.description: All API requests using this token will inherit your access permissions and be attributed to you as an individual.
accessToken.limitedAccessDescription: Limit this token to specific capabilities.

chatPreferences.defaultModelDescription: This model will be used by Onyx by default in your chats.
chatPreferences.chatAutoScrollDescription: Automatically scroll to new content as chat generates response.
chatPreferences.smoothStreamingDescription: Animate streamed responses character-by-character. Disable to render chunks as they arrive.
chatPreferences.collapseLargePastesDescription: When pasting text longer than 3 lines or 200 characters, collapse it into a compact tile instead of inserting it inline. Click the tile to view or edit the full text.
chatPreferences.defaultAppModeDescription: Choose whether new sessions start in Search or Chat mode.
chatPreferences.searchUiDisabledTooltip: Search UI is disabled and can only be enabled by an admin.

personalPreferences.title: Personal Preferences
personalPreferences.description: Provide your custom preferences in natural language.
personalPreferences.placeholder: Describe how you want the system to behave and the tone it should use.

memory.title: Memory
memory.referenceStoredDescription: Let Onyx reference stored memories in chats.
memory.updateMemoriesDescription: Let Onyx generate and update stored memories.

promptShortcuts.title: Prompt Shortcuts
promptShortcuts.useShortcutsDescription: Enable shortcuts to quickly insert common prompts.
promptShortcuts.playbackSpeedDescription: Adjust the speed of voice playback.

toasts.deleteAllChatsFailed: Failed to delete all chat sessions
toasts.shortcutRequired: Both shortcut and expansion are required
toasts.deleteAllChatsSuccess: All your chat sessions have been deleted.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Capability bundles your Craft agent can reach for. This page shows built-in skills, skills shared with you, and your own personal skills.
skills.startFromScratchDescription: Write the instructions and add supporting files in Onyx.
skills.uploadSkillDescription: Import a SKILL.md file, ZIP file, or skill folder.
skills.failedToLoadDescription: Check the console for details and try refreshing the page.
skills.noSkillsDescription: No custom skills have been shared with you yet, and no built-ins are configured.

agentEditor.pleaseFixErrors: Please fix the errors in the form before saving.
agentEditor.waitForFiles: Please wait for files to finish uploading.
agentEditor.name: Name
agentEditor.instructionsDescription: Add instructions to tailor the response for this agent.
agentEditor.instructionsPlaceholder: Think step by step and show reasoning for complex problems. Use specific examples. Emphasize action items, and leave blanks for the human to fill in when you have unknown. Use a polite enthusiastic tone.
agentEditor.conversationStartersDescription: Example messages that help users understand what this agent can do and how to interact with it effectively.
agentEditor.shareThisAgentDescription: with other users, groups, or everyone in your organization.
agentEditor.featureThisAgentDescription: Show this agent at the top of the explore agents list and automatically pin it to the sidebar for new users with access.

deleteAgent.title: Delete Agent
deleteAgent.warning: Anyone using this agent will no longer be able to access it. Deletion cannot be undone.
deleteAgent.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this agent?

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Tools and capabilities available for this agent to use.
actions.imageGenerationDescription: Generate and manipulate images using AI-powered tools.
actions.webSearchDescription: Search the web for real-time information and up-to-date results.
actions.openUrlDescription: Fetch and read content from web URLs.
actions.codingAgentDescription: Investigate a GitHub repository and answer questions about its code.

agentEditor.userFilesDescription: All files selected for this agent
